name: adachi-monorepo
description: Adachi — OSS React UI kit (@tokidevs/adachi) + production demo app.

scripts.dev: npm run build -w @tokidevs/adachi && concurrently -k "npm run dev -w @tokidevs/adachi" "npm run dev -w adachi-web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @tokidevs/adachi && npm run build -w adachi-web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @tokidevs/adachi && npm run typecheck -w adachi-web
